hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【AI】惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系；【FINANCE】特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹；【CRYPTO】验证者接受 XRP Ledger 最近的升级。但还不是每个人都同意。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: Bitcoin rebounds after Trump says he's become 'a big crypto guy'
items.summary: Earlier, bitcoin fell toward $60,000 after Strategy disclosed the sale of more of its holdings of the token.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他已成为“加密货币大佬”后，比特币反弹
items.summary_zh: 早些时候，在 Strategy 披露出售更多所持代币后，比特币跌至 60,000 美元。

items.title: Validators embrace XRP Ledger's recent upgrade. But not everyone’s on board yet
items.summary: The new software leads among the network's validators, yet by node count it sits behind the older v3.1.3, and the security amendment bundled with it remains a separate, slower vote. The upgrade needs 80% of the trusted validator list to activate.
items.title_zh: 验证者接受 XRP Ledger 最近的升级。但还不是每个人都同意
items.summary_zh: 新软件在网络验证器中处于领先地位，但从节点数量来看，它落后于旧版 v3.1.3，并且与其捆绑的安全修正案仍然是单独的、较慢的投票。升级需要 80% 的可信验证者列表才能激活。

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.summary: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.
items.title_zh: 美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间
items.summary_zh: 在过去 35 年左右的时间里，美联储只进行一次利率调整的情况很少见，无论是上调还是下调。

items.title: Citadel drops U.S. Portofino suit, seeks bankruptcy order against firm's founder in UK
items.summary: After winning a 6 million-pound London arbitration award, Citadel dropped its U.S. trade secrets case, saying another judgment would likely go uncollected.
items.title_zh: Citadel 放弃美国波托菲诺诉讼，寻求针对英国公司创始人的破产令
items.summary_zh: 在赢得 600 万英镑的伦敦仲裁裁决后，Citadel 放弃了其美国商业机密案件，称另一项判决可能无法收回。

items.title: India central bank seeks to bar financial institutions from exposure to crypto assets: Reuters
items.summary: India's central bank called for banks to be barred from crypto exposure as it reiterated support for tighter restrictions on digital assets.
items.title_zh: 印度央行寻求禁止金融机构接触加密资产：路透社
items.summary_zh: 印度央行呼吁禁止银行参与加密货币投资，并重申支持对数字资产实施更严格的限制。

items.title: Kraken wins $22 million arbitration against auditor Mazars for ditching the firm during Operation Choke Point 2.0
items.summary: Payward sued its former auditor, Mazars, for abandoning a nearly complete audit during Operation Choke Point 2.0.
items.title_zh: Kraken 赢得针对审计师 Mazars 的 2200 万美元仲裁，原因是其在“阻塞点 2.0”行动期间放弃了该公司
items.summary_zh: 无限循环 (Payward) 起诉其前审计师玛泽 (Mazars)，称其在“阻塞点 2.0”行动期间放弃了几乎完整的审计。

items.title: Live Updates: Trump Lashes Out at NATO Summit but Offers New Help to Ukraine
items.summary: Though President Trump assailed partners for not joining the war in Iran, he said he would grant Ukraine long-sought authority to make the Patriot defense system.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：特朗普在北约峰会上猛烈抨击，但向乌克兰提供新的帮助
items.summary_zh: 尽管特朗普总统批评合作伙伴没有参加伊朗战争，但他表示，他将授予乌克兰长期以来寻求的权力来制造爱国者防御系统。

items.title: Bitcoin's inflation quagmire gets stickier as renewed MidEast conflict sends oil price soaring
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 8, 2026
items.title_zh: 中东冲突重燃导致油价飙升，比特币的通胀泥潭变得更加棘手
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 8 日天气预报

items.title: Crypto and stocks tumble after Trump declares ceasefire 'over' following Iran strikes
items.summary: Bitcoin fell, altcoins slid after Trump said the ceasefire with Iran is "over" as U.S. and Iran traded airstrikes.
items.title_zh: 特朗普宣布伊朗袭击“结束”停火后，加密货币和股市暴跌
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普表示美国和伊朗进行空袭后，与伊朗的停火已经“结束”后，比特币下跌，山寨币下跌。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin drops to $62,000, stocks slide, oil soars as Iran ceasefire collapses
items.summary: Hedge funds have turned the most bearish on the yen since 2007, boosting bets on further losses to nearly 138,000 contracts as of June 30.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：比特币跌至 62,000 美元，股市下滑，伊朗停火破裂导致油价飙升
items.summary_zh: 对冲基金对日元的看空达到了2007年以来的最高水平，截至6月30日，对日元进一步损失的押注增加至近138,000份合约。

items.title: Strategy’s 3,588 BTC sale puts future bitcoin selling in focus: analysts
items.summary: Strategy sold 3,588 BTC last week, with CF Benchmarks suggesting continued sales would become a concern if they stop being a choice.
items.title_zh: Strategy 的 3,588 BTC 销售使未来的比特币销售成为焦点：分析师
items.summary_zh: Strategy 上周出售了 3,588 BTC，CF Benchmarks 表明，如果它们不再成为一种选择，持续销售将成为一个问题。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
items.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.
items.title_zh: 中国通过 Anthropic 的克劳德代码警告人工智能风险
items.summary_zh: 中国表示，克劳德代码的特定版本存在后门漏洞，可以将敏感信息发送到远程服务器。

items.title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
items.summary: Speculators think the massive rally in the Nasdaq-100 since the lows following the U.S.-Iran war will be more subdued in the second half of 2026.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 交易员认为纳斯达克 100 指数到 2026 年年底将突破 30,000 点，并预测今年下半年会更加凉爽
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为，纳斯达克 100 指数自美伊战争后低点以来的大幅上涨将在 2026 年下半年受到抑制。

items.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
items.summary: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.
items.title_zh: 克拉纳寻求美国银行牌照，以超越“先买后付”的最新举措
items.summary_zh: Klarna 加入了寻求进入传统银行系统的金融科技和加密货币公司浪潮。

items.title: Citadel's hedge funds post broad first-half gains, top performing strategy sidesteps quant selloff
items.summary: The hedge fund firm's tactical trading fund, which combines discretionary equity investing with quantitative strategies, climbed 14.3% through the end of June.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的对冲基金上半年大幅上涨，表现最佳的策略避开了量化抛售
items.summary_zh: 这家对冲基金公司的战术交易基金将全权委托股票投资与量化策略相结合，截至 6 月底上涨了 14.3%。

items.title: Trump says ceasefire is 'over' after US and Iran trade strikes
items.summary: Speaking ahead of a Nato summit, the president says US negotiators can keep talking with the Iranians "if they want".
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国和伊朗贸易打击后停火已“结束”
items.summary_zh: 总统在北约峰会前发表讲话称，美国谈判代表“如果愿意”可以继续与伊朗对话。

items.title: Eight killed after landslide hits girls' school in Bangladesh

items.title_zh: 孟加拉国女子学校发生山体滑坡，八人死亡
items.summary_zh: 东南海岸遭遇季风大雨后，救援人员从泥浆中拉出尸体。

items.title: Cubans protest after third nationwide power cut this year
items.summary: While Cuban officials said that power had been mostly restored, those still left in the dark vented their anger.
items.title_zh: 古巴人抗议今年第三次全国停电
items.summary_zh: 尽管古巴官员表示供电已基本恢复，但那些仍蒙在鼓里的人却发泄了愤怒。

items.title: The Alluring Albanian Island Inspiring Ivanka’s Fantasy
items.summary: A former military base in the Adriatic Sea, the island is in a beautiful setting but it is strewed with snakes, crumbling buildings and land mines.
items.title_zh: 迷人的阿尔巴尼亚岛屿激发了伊万卡的幻想
items.summary_zh: 该岛曾是亚得里亚海的军事基地，环境优美，但岛上却布满了蛇、摇摇欲坠的建筑物和地雷。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.

items.summary: “I think it’s over,” President Trump said, referring to the preliminary truce, and threatened to strike Iran again. The two sides traded attacks as their truce appeared to edge closer to collapse.

items.title: Le Pen Launches Presidential Campaign, in a Twist for French Politics

items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.summary: Speculators now see just a 44% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预测，在经历了最近的挫折后，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到 2027 年才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 投机者现在认为交通流量在 12 月 1 日之前恢复正常的可能性只有 44%。

items.title: Buy these quality, low-stress stocks for the summer, says Jefferies
items.summary: This summer, Jefferies recommends focusing on some high-quality stocks that have been left behind by the AI momentum trade.
items.title_zh: 杰富瑞表示，在夏季购买这些优质、低压力的股票
items.summary_zh: 今年夏天，杰富瑞建议关注一些被人工智能动能交易抛在后面的优质股票。

items.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.title_zh: 世界杯使得预测市场量飙升至历史新高
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量在 6 月份均创下历史新高。新的预测市场平台 Rothera 也能够管理 20 亿美元的交易量。

items.title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
items.summary: Nearly a decade after leaving its former home, the Museum of American Finance is opening its new doors to the public.
items.title_zh: 不要放弃在波士顿新金融博物馆与人工智能亚历山大·汉密尔顿交谈的机会
items.summary_zh: 离开旧址近十年后，美国金融博物馆向公众敞开了新的大门。

items.title: German doctor jailed for murder of 15 patients and suspected of more
items.summary: The German palliative care doctor has been sentenced to life imprisonment for killing 15 of his patients.
items.title_zh: 德国医生因谋杀15名患者被判入狱，并涉嫌谋杀更多患者
items.summary_zh: 德国姑息治疗医生因杀害 15 名患者而被判处无期徒刑。

items.title: Teenager arrested after two girls, 13, seriously injured in German school attack
items.summary: Police said a major operation was under way in the area of Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school in Schongau, Bavaria.
items.title_zh: 两名 13 岁女孩在德国学校袭击中受重伤，一名青少年被捕
items.summary_zh: 警方表示，巴伐利亚雄高韦尔芬中学 (Welfen-Gymnasium secondary school) 地区正在进行大规模行动。

items.title: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project
items.summary: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.
items.title_zh: 北约盟国宣布斥资370亿英镑用于新导弹项目
items.summary_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默爵士将在安卡拉召集十几位领导人讨论该计划。

items.title: Nigeria's president demands to know how fake agency was allegedly set up in his office
items.summary: Adeniyi Adeyemi allegedly forged a letter of appointment and secured funding for an agency the presidency knew nothing about.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚总统要求了解他的办公室如何设立假机构
items.summary_zh: 据称，阿德尼伊·阿德耶米伪造了一份任命书，并为总统一无所知的机构获取了资金。

items.title: Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
items.summary: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚最大电信公司发生重大停电，火车和紧急呼叫受到影响
items.summary_zh: 悉尼和墨尔本数据中心的服务器是罪魁祸首，但确切原因仍不清楚。

items.title: At Iran’s Funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei, Mourners Bid an Emotional Farewell
items.summary: Millions of Iranians descended on Tehran to pay their respects to the slain supreme leader.
items.title_zh: 在伊朗阿亚图拉哈梅内伊的葬礼上，哀悼者深情告别
items.summary_zh: 数百万伊朗人涌向德黑兰，向被杀的最高领袖表示敬意。

items.title: Trump’s Arrival in Turkey for NATO Summit Adds Drama and Spectacle
items.summary: The second President Trump landed in Turkey, the center of gravity shifted right to where he likes it best: himself.
items.title_zh: 特朗普抵达土耳其参加北约峰会增添戏剧性和奇观
items.summary_zh: 第二任特朗普总统登陆土耳其后，重心右移到了他最喜欢的地方：他自己。

items.title: Marine Le Pen’s Return Has Sidelined Her Protégé. Can They Join Forces?
items.summary: For months, Jordan Bardella was set to be the French far-right’s candidate for the presidency — until his mentor, Marine Le Pen, nudged him aside this week. Their relationship could define the campaign.
items.title_zh: 玛丽娜·勒庞的回归让她的门生退居二线。他们能联手吗？
items.summary_zh: 几个月来，乔丹·巴尔德拉(Jordan Bardella)一直被认为是法国极右翼的总统候选人——直到他的导师马琳·勒庞(Marine Le Pen)本周将他推到一边。他们的关系可以决定这场竞选活动。

items.title: Iraqis Turn Out in Droves to Mourn Khamenei and Show Solidarity
items.summary: In the cities of Najaf and Karbala, home to two of Shiite Islam’s holiest sites, hundreds of thousands attended commemorations for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who extended Iran’s influence in Iraq.
items.title_zh: 伊拉克人成群结队哀悼哈梅内伊并表示声援
items.summary_zh: 在纳杰夫和卡尔巴拉这两个什叶派伊斯兰教最圣地的城市，数十万人参加了阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊的纪念活动，他扩大了伊朗在伊拉克​​的影响力。

items.title: NATO Summit Gives Trump New Chance to Bust Out Old Grievances
items.summary: President Trump brought his combative side to the meeting of world leaders in Turkey, kicking off a day of diplomacy with a panoply of complaints and insults against U.S. allies.
items.title_zh: 北约峰会给特朗普破除旧怨的新机会
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统在土耳其举行的世界领导人会议上展现了好斗的一面，以对美国盟友的一系列抱怨和侮辱拉开了一天的外交序幕。

items.title: Farage’s Resignation Risks Becoming Farce as U.K. Parties Boycott Clacton By-Election
items.summary: Under investigation over an undisclosed gift, the right-wing leader Nigel Farage may end up in a special election against a candidate dressed as a trash can.
items.title_zh: 由于英国政党抵制克拉克顿补选，法拉奇的辞职有可能成为闹剧
items.summary_zh: 右翼领导人奈杰尔·法拉奇正在接受一项未公开礼物的调查，他最终可能会在一场特别选举中与一位打扮成垃圾桶的候选人竞争。

items.title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
items.summary: The move comes as firms race to build the infrastructure for blockchain-based stocks and debate how tokenized stocks should work.
items.title_zh: Dinari 和 tZERO 联手打造美国股票代币化交钥匙平台
items.summary_zh: 此举出台之际，各公司竞相为基于区块链的股票建立基础设施，并讨论代币化股票应如何运作。

items.title: Adam Back's BSTR scraps SPAC merger, seeks new deal
items.summary: BSTR and Cantor Equity Partners will not complete their merger under the original July 2025 agreement, with the shareholder postponed indefinitely.
items.title_zh: Adam Back 的 BSTR 放弃 SPAC 合并，寻求新交易
items.summary_zh: BSTR 和 Cantor Equity Partners 将不会根据原定 2025 年 7 月的协议完成合并，股东无限期推迟。

items.title: BNB Chain is building a new layer-1 for high-frequency trading and AI agents
items.summary: The network aims to process over 100,000 transactions per second by streaming them directly, eliminating public queues to make trades faster and more secure.
items.title_zh: BNB Chain正在为高频交易和人工智能代理构建新的Layer-1
items.summary_zh: 该网络旨在通过直接流式处理每秒处理超过 100,000 笔交易，消除公共队列，使交易更快、更安全。

items.title: BNB Chain builds new Layer 1 for agentic trading, targets 2027 mainnet
items.summary: BNB Chain is building a new Layer 1 for agentic trading with sub-50ms preconfirmation and no public mempool, targeting testnet by end-2026.
items.title_zh: BNB Chain 为代理交易构建新的 Layer 1，目标是 2027 年主网
items.summary_zh: BNB Chain 正在构建一个新的第 1 层，用于代理交易，预确认时间低于 50 毫秒，并且没有公共内存池，目标是在 2026 年底之前测试网络。

items.title: Nigel Farage to quit UK Parliament, seek new mandate amid probes into crypto-linked gifts
items.summary: Nigel Farage resigned as an MP amid two probes over gifts from Tether investor Christopher Harborne and convicted fraudster George Cottrell.
items.title_zh: 奈杰尔·法拉奇退出英国议会，在对加密货币礼物的调查中寻求新的授权
items.summary_zh: 在针对 Tether 投资者 Christopher Harbourne 和被定罪的欺诈者 George Cottrell 的礼物进行的两项调查中，奈杰尔·法拉奇 (Nigel Farage) 辞去议员职务。

items.title: CFTC charges North Carolina man over alleged $14 million crypto, futures fraud
items.summary: The CFTC charged a NC man and his company after the agency said he swindled about 60 people out of $14 million in a commodity pool.
items.title_zh: CFTC 指控北卡罗来纳州男子涉嫌价值 1400 万美元的加密货币期货欺诈
items.summary_zh: CFTC 指控一名北卡罗来纳州男子及其公司，称他从商品池中骗取了约 60 人的 1,400 万美元资金。

items.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
items.summary: See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.
items.title_zh: Australian Payment Plus 借助 ChatGPT 和 Codex 加快步伐
items.summary_zh: 了解 Australian Payments Plus 如何使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 更快地应对支付复杂性。 AP+ 可以节省时间、提高质量并以人类判断为中心。

items.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
items.summary: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.
items.title_zh: MUFG 旨在通过 OpenAI 成为人工智能原生
items.summary_zh: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建人工智能原生组织、改进工作流程并大规模提供新的人工智能驱动的金融服务。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用范围如何扩大
items.summary_zh: 新的 OpenAI Signals 数据显示了 ChatGPT 在全球范围内的采用情况如何增长，用户使用量不断增加，探索更多功能，并推动跨地区和语言的增长。

items.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
items.title_zh: Genebench-Pro 内部

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
items.title_zh: 绘制欧洲人工智能劳动力机会图
items.summary_zh: 一份新的 OpenAI 报告描绘了人工智能如何重塑整个欧盟的就业机会，强调哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。

items.title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
items.title_zh: 一键从 Hugging Face 到 Amazon SageMaker Studio

items.title: Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot
items.title_zh: 在任何云上运行 AI 工作负载，存储在 Hugging Face 上：使用 SkyPilot 实现零出口存储

items.title: LeRobot v0.6.0: Imagine, Evaluate, Improve
items.title_zh: 乐机器人v0.6.0：想象、评估、改进

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.title_zh: Hugging Face 和 Cerebras 将 Gemma 4 引入实时语音 AI

items.title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
items.title_zh: ScarfBench：企业 Java 框架迁移的 AI 代理基准测试

items.title: Why Specialization Is Inevitable
items.title_zh: 为什么专业化是不可避免的

items.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等
items.summary_zh: 我们宣布在 Gemini API 中的托管代理中提供新功能，以便开发人员可以构建可靠的、可用于生产的代理。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：为美国未来 250 年进行创新和教育
items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？
items.summary_zh: 计算机科学家 Phillip Isola 打破了炒作，解释了人工智能代理的工作原理以及这项快速发展的技术的未来。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。
